subject: Initialize Astro project with Tailwind + DaisyUI
description: Phase 1.2: Initialize Astro project at workspace root. Create astro.config.mjs with static output. Set up Tailwind CSS via @astrojs/tailwind. Add DaisyUI plugin with dark theme. Create directory structure (src/layouts, src/pages, src/components, src/styles, src/utils, public, data). Install all dependencies. Verify `npm run dev` works.
